title: 3aSuperModPack
description:
An ancient world where electricity has just been invented but it is still in the magic

This modpack gives you a special experience where on one hand you have the power of engineering and electricity while on another you have the power of magic where you
body:
This modpack gives you a special experience where on one hand you have the power of engineering and electricity while on another you have the power of magic where you are free except from the Money that you can use to buy items with your friends.

This modpack includes the following mods that require attribution:

- [Camera Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Easy NPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc)
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
